title: The Trumpeter Taken Prisoner
content:
A Trumpeter, prisoner made,
    Hoped his life would be spared when he said
    He'd no part in the fight,
    But they answered him--"Right,
    But what of the music you made?"

    Songs May Serve A Cause As Well As Swords
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Trumpeter Taken Prisoner"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
